title: JOB CONNECTION - 211info
text: OPPORTUNITY OREGON JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive employment services such as resume and cover letter support, interview practice, networking and referrals to potential employers, and job placement. Individual and peer mentoring groups and navigation of community resources is available on a case by case, limited basis. Services available virtually or in-person. 1045 Gateway Loop Suite C Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Individuals who are currently or were formerly incarcerated Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (541) 844-1817 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 844-1817 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Lane and Linn Counties: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information All other counties within the state of Oregon: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Gateway bus stop (near Gateway Mall) is one block away Services: Ex-Offender Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPPORTUNITY OREGON
